notableEvents.label: Alec Bohm plunked
notableEvents.detail: Braves challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Alec Bohm hit by pitch. Adolis García to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Eli White pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eli White grounds out, first baseman Bryce Harper to pitcher Kyle Backhus.
